name: Wagg Dog Treats BBQ Bangers 125g
description: Product Benefits Contain 28% pork including pork meal and gelatine, wheat, chicken fat, glycerine, minerals, and whey powder Rich in vitamins (A, D3, and E), minerals (zinc, manganese, copper, iodine), and antioxidants and is a nutritious snack for your pet Oven-baked treats rich in smoky meaty aroma No artificial color, additives, and flavors Suitable for puppies above 8 weeks of age; can be used for training your dogs Ingredients Wheat, Pork (28%), Pork Meal (26%), Gelatin (2%), Glycerin, Chicken Fat, Minerals, Whey powder Additives Vitamin A, Vitamin D3, Vitamin E, Copper (as Cupric sulphate pentahydrate), Manganese (as Manganese sulphate monohydrate), Zinc (as Zinc sulphate monohydrate), Iodine (as Calcium iodate anhydrous), Selenium (as Sodium selenite) Analytical Constituents Protein (26.9%), Crude Fibers (0.94%), Crude Oils and Fats (7.7%), Crude Ash (6.8%), Moisture (18%) Analytical Constituents Vitamin A, Vitamin D3, Vitamin E, Copper (as Cupric sulphate pentahydrate), Manganese (as Manganese sulphate monohydrate), Zinc (as Zinc sulphate monohydrate).
